allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host done')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process -Id 106960 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName; Get-Process -Id 35624 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName; Write-Host check-done')
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize')
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process python* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess, State | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Id 15320 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess, State")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Id 95244 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Id 50768 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Write-Output ''Port 8000 is FREE'' }")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction Stop; ''STILL IN USE'' } catch { ''Port 8000 is FREE'' }")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object OwningProcess, State } catch { ''NOT LISTENING YET'' }")
